channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Khune and Williams reflect on historic World Cup campaign and mutual respect
item.description: Bafana Bafana legend Itumeleng Khune has paid an emotional tribute to national team captain Ronwen Williams following South Africa's historic FIFA World Cup campaign in North America. The former Kaize...

item.title: Interior Secretary Doug Burgum Declines to Explicitly Condemn Patriot Front During CNN Interview
item.description: Interior Secretary Doug Burgum declined multiple opportunities to explicitly condemn the white supremacist group Patriot Front during an interview on CNN's 'State of the Union' following the group's J...

item.title: Jesús Piñero recounts surviving a shooting during a robbery in Caracas and rebuilding his life
item.description: This feature tells the story of Jesús Piñero, a Venezuelan historian and academic who survived being shot during a robbery in Caracas in March 2016. At the age of 22, Piñero was travelling home by bus...

item.title: Alberta Referendum Fundraising: Pro-Separation Group Leads in Donations
item.description: The pro-separation group Let Alberta Decide has emerged as the top fundraiser among third-party advertisers in Alberta's October referendum campaign, securing over $207,000 in donations as of July 2, ...

item.title: Lewis Capaldi makes light of past ticket sales comments during Roundhay Festival headline performance in Leeds
item.description: Lewis Capaldi headlined the inaugural Roundhay Festival in Leeds on 4 July 2026, where he used part of his set to reference a previous public comment he had made about ticket sales for the same show. ...

item.title: Former First Lady Aisha Buhari Launches Computer Science Complex to Honor Husband's Legacy
item.description: Former First Lady Hajiya Aisha Muhammadu Buhari unveiled a groundbreaking initiative for a new Computer Science Complex at Al-Qalam University, Katsina, marking the late President Muhammadu Buhari's l...

item.title: GOOD Party criticises City of Cape Town over delayed affordable housing delivery following Constitutional Court ruling
item.description: The GOOD Party has strongly criticised the City of Cape Town following a recent Constitutional Court ruling concerning the long-running Tafelberg School site dispute. The ruling found that both the Ci...

item.title: CRDB Bank's Campaign Rewards Three Winners with World Cup Travel to Canada
item.description: CRDB Bank has rewarded three Tanzanian winners with travel opportunities to the FIFA World Cup in Canada as part of its Fainali Ndo Mpango na TemboCard promotional campaign. The winners, including Ruk...

item.title: Football Australia reaffirms confidence in Tony Popovic after Socceroos' World Cup exit to Egypt
item.description: Football Australia has publicly reaffirmed its support for Socceroos coach Tony Popovic following Australia's elimination from the FIFA World Cup after a penalty shootout defeat to Egypt. The governin...

item.title: PDP Candidate Alleges Irregularities in Ekiti Governorship Election
item.description: Wole Oluyede, PDP governorship candidate in Ekiti State, has rejected the June 20, 2026, election results, claiming the process was neither free nor fair. He alleges widespread voter inducement, intim...

item.title: Tyla delivers electrifying performance at Afro Nation Portugal
item.description: South African artist Tyla captivated a global audience at Afro Nation Portugal with a high-energy performance that showcased her artistic evolution and upcoming album A*POP. Performing on Praia da Roc...

item.title: Trump's Birthday Celebrations Disrupted by Storm Evacuation
item.description: President Donald Trump's July 4 birthday celebrations were disrupted by a storm evacuation, marking a significant event in the United States' 250th anniversary of the Declaration of Independence. On a...

item.title: Morena Aims for Injury-Free Season and More Trophies with Mamelodi Sundowns
item.description: Thapelo Morena, a versatile player for Mamelodi Sundowns, has reached his 300th appearance milestone and is recovering well from an injury that kept him out of the Bafana Bafana squad for the 2026 FIF...

item.title: Wildfire evacuation ordered in B.C.'s Fraser Valley
item.description: Residents of North Bend, B.C., are being evacuated as an out-of-control wildfire continues to spread in the Fraser Valley. The fire, located near Boston Bar, has grown to 100 hectares and is believed ...

item.title: Laguna Approves Right to Care Ordinance for Medical Decision-Making
item.description: Laguna province has approved the Right to Care ordinance, allowing individuals to designate someone to make medical decisions on their behalf during emergencies. This measure, part of broader efforts ...

item.title: Seaplane Makes Emergency Water Landing in New York’s East River; Eight People Safely Rescued
item.description: A Kodiak 100 seaplane made an emergency water landing in New York City's East River shortly after noon on Sunday, coming down between Brooklyn and Manhattan near the Williamsburg Bridge. According to ...

item.title: CRDB Bank rewards three TemboCard customers with Canada World Cup trip to promote digital payments
item.description: CRDB Bank has awarded three Tanzanian customers an all-expenses-paid trip to Canada to watch the FIFA World Cup Round of 16 matches as part of its “Fainali Ndo Mpango na TemboCard” promotional campaig...

item.title: Rising Temperatures in Europe Trigger Wildfires and Forest Destruction
item.description: The article discusses the escalating crisis of wildfires sweeping through Europe's forests, exacerbated by record-breaking temperatures. As global warming intensifies, regions like Spain, France, and ...

item.title: Cam Myers breaks Australian and Oceania mile record with victory at the Eugene Diamond League
item.description: Australian middle-distance runner Cam Myers continued his outstanding rise by winning the Bowerman men's mile at the Eugene Diamond League in the United States while setting new Australian and Oceania...

item.title: Sigmund Freud's 'The Interpretation of Dreams' and the Foundations of Psychoanalysis
item.description: Sigmund Freud's 'The Interpretation of Dreams' (1900) revolutionized psychology by introducing the concept of the unconscious mind. The article explores how Freud's work established psychoanalysis as ...
